name: burrow-git-helpers
description: src/git/exec.ts (shared runGit/runGitOrThrow), src/git/worktree.ts (discoverHostClone, addWorktree, removeWorktree, listWorktrees, branchExists, cloneRepo, initRepo, pruneWorktrees), src/git/identity.ts (readHostGitIdentity, resolveBurrowIdentity, writeBurrowGitconfig with .gitconfig.burrow filename), src/git/ssh.ts (detectSshAgent).
